title: [Cloud] Flamingo/Spoonbill - Connect headset as standalone
scenario: Verify standalone pairing of Voyager Legend 50/30 headset (not via charge case) shows correct device name and earpiece-only details in Poly Studio Mobile app and cloud web page
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the '+' icon or 'Add Device' to begin pairing.
3. Put the Poly Voyager Legend 50 or Voyager Legend 30 headset into pairing mode (press and hold the Power button until the LED flashes red/blue).
4. From the list of available devices in the app, select the headset to pair it directly (not via a charge case).
5. Confirm the headset appears on the cloud web page (Poly Lens or Poly Studio Mobile cloud portal) as 'Voyager Legend 50' or 'Voyager Legend 30'.
6. Open the device details page on the cloud web portal.
7. Verify that only earpiece information is displayed on the device details page.
8. Confirm the device image shown on the details page depicts only the earpiece (not a case or other accessories).
expected: The Poly Voyager Legend 50 or Voyager Legend 30 headset connects as a standalone device. On the cloud web page, the device appears as "Voyager Legend 50" or "Voyager Legend 30". The device details page shows only earpiece info and an image of just the earpiece.
